AboutPage.title: My Journey As A Builder
AboutPage.subtitle: Bridging Design with Robust System Logic
AboutPage.story: I design, architect, and deliver interactive digital platforms. Focused on high performance and clean architectures, I love converting complex UI designs into clean, high-speed applications.

SkillsPage.title: Technical Expertise
SkillsPage.subtitle: 3+ years of architecting interactive front-ends, scaling state infrastructure, managing data networks, and engineering production workflows.
SkillsPage.catCoreDesc: Engineering high-performance SSR/SSG sites and typed web systems.
SkillsPage.catStateDesc: Managing complex application state architectures with atomic and relational frameworks.
SkillsPage.catUiDesc: Crafting fluid responsive layouts using accessible, atomic style patterns.
SkillsPage.catAdvancedDesc: Developing offline-first architectures, state sync caching, and WebSocket streams.
SkillsPage.catMobileDesc: Building cross-platform mobile environments and native android compilation hooks.
SkillsPage.catOpsDesc: Deploying apps to cloud servers and scaling SEO systems for optimal load speeds.

ProjectsPage.title: Recent Architecture Builds
ProjectsPage.subtitle: A collection of production applications highlighting decoupled states, real-time client streaming, and performance optimization.
ProjectsPage.proj1Desc: (intsw) - International trade platform (government) for education and trade facilitation with proforma invoice facilities, glossary, and commercial contracts, along with introductions to exporting companies.
ProjectsPage.proj2Desc: The Comprehensive Trade System has been developed to facilitate commercial activities and monitor goods in the commercial chain. This system has tried to integrate and facilitate the provision of commercial services by creating a single portal. The present application has also been prepared with the aim of making it easier to use the services of the Comprehensive Trade System.
ProjectsPage.proj3Desc: High throughput socket streaming system displaying live real-time network interactions using fully isolated Redux Saga channels.
